source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A uniform magnetic field \( \vec{B} \), with magnitude 1.2\ \mathrm{mT}, is directed vertically upward throughout the volume of a laboratory chamber. A proton with kinetic energy 5.3\ \mathrm{MeV} enters the chamber, moving horizontally from south to north. The proton mass is \( 1.67 \times 10^{-27}\ \mathrm{kg} \). (Neglect Earth’s magnetic field.) What is the magnitude of the magnetic force acting on the proton when it enters the field?

image_dependency: 题干文本已给出求解所需关键量：B 的大小、质子动能、运动方向与磁场方向，单靠文字即可建立 F=qvB 且夹角为 90°。
虽然字段中有 requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，但从可见题干内容看不存在明显必须读取图片中的数值、图表或几何标注。
asset_registry_record 中图片存在且 registry_passed=true，说明有图像资源，但不能仅凭存在图片就判定高图像依赖。
multi_step: 求解通常需先由动能求速度，再用磁力公式 F=qvB（或 qvBsinθ）计算，属于至少两步计算。
题干还要求识别速度方向与磁场方向互相垂直，从而取 sinθ=1，包含物理关系判断。
答案为数值型且给出 4 个选项，表明该题是标准定量求解题而非单步直接读取题。
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，标准答案为明确数值“6.1 × 10^-15 N”，便于程序或规则核验。
题目给定输入量充分，采用固定公式和单位换算即可复现结果，可验证性强。
asset_registry_record 显示 question_present=true、answer_present=true、registry_passed=true，样本完整性良好。

risk_flags: requires_image 与题干自包含程度可能不一致
text_dominant=false 但文本似乎已足够求解，存在模态标注偏差风险

decision_reasons: question, answer, and image are all present and registry_passed is true
verifiability is very high because the answer is a precise short-text numeric result
the problem appears recoverable and solvable from the available text even if modality metadata may be inconsistent
minor risk flags indicate annotation ambiguity rather than missing core semantic assets
